step_rationale: Post-MI angiogenesis and inflammation; systemic injury response.
mechanism: HGF functions as a post-MI inflammation and angiogenesis-related marker, reflecting myocardial injury response and atherosclerotic burden.

Hepatocyte growth factor and cardiovascular thrombosis in patients admitted to the intensive care unit.
